prompt: Sera ProtocolでlimitBidを出すための完全な手順を教えて。トークンのapproveからtx送信、確認待ちまで。viemを使った具体的なコード例をください。priceIndex=12000, rawAmount=500で。

assertions.name: erc20_approve_step
assertions.description: Includes ERC20 approve step before placing the order

assertions.name: correct_limit_order_params
assertions.description: LimitOrderParams includes market, deadline, user, priceIndex(12000), rawAmount(500), postOnly, useNative, baseAmount

assertions.name: deadline_set
assertions.description: Sets a future deadline timestamp (not zero or missing)

assertions.name: complete_flow
assertions.description: Covers the full lifecycle: approve → place → confirm (all 3 steps)
